title: PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SWEET HOME HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered health care. Services include wellness visits, chronic disease management, health screenings, and family planning. Pharmacy and after hour nurse line available for medical, mental, or dental care clients. 1023 Main Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-3533 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-3533 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. No one turned away because of inability to pay for services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Family Counseling General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SWEET HOME HEALTH CENTER
